tools.name: store_catalog
tools.description: List everything for sale at dacix.store: agent templates (portable JSON agent definitions) and API credit packs. No auth needed.

tools.name: store_register
tools.description: Create a DACIX account and get an API key (dacix_sk_...) plus free trial credits. Store the key — it authenticates every other tool here.

tools.name: store_account
tools.description: Check your DACIX account: credit balance and owned templates.

tools.name: store_buy
tools.description: Buy a product. Returns a Stripe checkout_url — open it (or give it to your human) to pay. Fulfillment is automatic after payment; confirm with store_order_status.

tools.name: store_order_status
tools.description: Check an order's status after payment (pending → paid).

tools.name: store_download_template
tools.description: Download a purchased agent template (full JSON: system prompt, tools, schemas).

tools.name: web_crawl
tools.description: Fetch any public web page server-side and get clean readable text back. Costs 5 credits (new accounts get 25 free).

tools.name: ro_company_lookup
tools.description: Romanian company registry profile by CUI (tax ID): legal name, active/struck-off status, VAT registration, CAEN, address. ~2M companies. 10 credits (charged only if found).

tools.name: ro_company_search
tools.description: Search Romanian companies by name — returns CUI, legal form, county, active/struck-off per match. 10 credits.

tools.name: ro_company_search_by_address
tools.description: Find every Romanian company registered at an address (due diligence: who is registered here?). 10 credits.

tools.name: ro_company_financials
tools.description: Yearly financials for a Romanian company by CUI: net turnover, profit/loss, employees, equity, assets, debt — multi-year history. 20 credits (charged only if data exists).

tools.name: ro_company_list
tools.description: Browse Romanian companies with filters: county (judet), active vs struck-off (radiata), VAT-registered (tva). Paginated. 10 credits/page.

tools.name: classified_categories
tools.description: Category tree of micapublicitate.online (Romanian classifieds) — pick a category_id before posting an ad. Free.

tools.name: post_classified_ad
tools.description: Publish a real classified ad on micapublicitate.online (Romanian classifieds, 90-day listing). Returns the public URL. 20 credits, charged only when the ad is accepted.

tools.name: city_info
tools.description: Practical civic info for 28,674 cities worldwide as clean markdown (from rules.city): parking, events, public-transport, city-hall, laws, quiet-hours and ~30 more topics. 5 credits.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web via DuckDuckGo — returns structured results with titles, URLs, and snippets. 5 credits.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a page with enhanced text extraction — scripts/styles/nav stripped, clean readable text + word count. 5 credits.

tools.name: analyze_seo
tools.description: Full SEO audit of a page: title, meta description, Open Graph tags, heading structure (h1/h2/h3), internal/external link count, word count. 5 credits.

tools.name: compare_pages
tools.description: Fetch 2-5 pages and compare their titles, word counts, and content previews side by side. 10 credits.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: web_crawl, web_search · Private data: store_register · Public sink: post_classified_ad.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: web_crawl, web_search · Private data: store_register · Public sink: post_classified_ad

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
